name: Category Leadership
objective: Provide an insight-led, retailer-ready category strategy that clarifies category role, identifies key growth drivers, defines priority growth pathways, and establishes activation guardrails.

name: Customer Business Planning (CBP / JBP)
relevance_triggers: aligning investments and initiatives with retailers
objective: Translate strategic or tactical priorities into a clear, executable customer plan aligned to retailer objectives, planning cycles, and commercial realities.

name: Commercial Strategy
relevance_triggers: need for a commercial north star
objective: Define a clear, integrated commercial strategy that aligns brand roles, channel priorities, value propositions, and investment choices to drive sustainable, profitable growth.

name: Channel & Go-To-Market Strategy
objective: Define how strategy reaches the market by clarifying channel roles, route-to-market choices, and execution priorities by channel and customer type.
outcomes: clear channel roles and growth model

name: Retail Growth Story
relevance_triggers: strategy is not landing with retailers
objective: Create a clear, compelling, retailer-ready growth story that shows how the category or brand will drive mutual growth, supported by evidence and aligned to retailer priorities.

name: Winning Formula
objective: Identify why performance varies across locations, territories, or agents and turn that into differentiated operating models, resource logic, and execution playbooks.

name: Marketing & Media Performance
objective: Improve marketing and retail media effectiveness by clarifying the role of brand, shopper, performance, and retail media, and by establishing better investment and measurement discipline.
outcomes: clear view of current marketing and media performance
defined role of retail media within the full funnel
stronger linkage between marketing activity and commercial outcomes

name: Org of the Future
objective: Design a future-state organization and operating model that clarifies roles, decision rights, governance, and capability needs so strategy can be executed more effectively.

name: Multi-Unit Strategy & Execution
relevance_triggers: need to balance standardization vs localization
objective: Design a scalable multi-unit strategy that enables differentiated growth by unit while enforcing enterprise consistency where it matters most.

name: Portfolio Focus & Rationalization
objective: Prioritize brands, sub-brands, and platforms so resources are concentrated where they deliver the greatest strategic and financial return.
